title: Crispy Tofu and Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired stir fry made with crispy tofu, crunchy vegetables, and a tangy sauce. Serve over steamed rice or noodles for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: 1. Cut tofu into small cubes and set aside.
2. Heat tadka in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add tofu to the skillet and fry until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add sliced bell pepper and onion to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Add snow peas to the skillet and cook until tender, about 1-2 minutes.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together greek yogurt and soy sauce.
7. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and tofu in the skillet and stir to combine.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Garnish with crumble and sesame seeds.
11. Serve over steamed rice or noodles.
